Usine et certificats

Usine de Jinhua fiable pour les acheteurs d’emballages papier alimentaires

Jinhua Langmai Daily-Using Co., Ltd. was founded in 2006. The company brief lists 30,000+ square meters factory capacity and 50+ elite team members for overseas B2B buyers.

Factory profile

The updated positioning is Cupcake liner manufacturer / OEM & ODM solution provider, serving Importers, distributors, bakery and confectionery buyers, large supermarkets across Middle East, North America, Europe, England, South America.

  • OEM/ODM customization for product, size, print and packaging.
  • FSC and EUDR certified signals for compliance-minded buyers.
  • Industrial-grade quality control and customized odorless ink.

Certificate names from catalog

Compliance signals to prepare for public release

BSCIISOFSCFDALFGBEUDRBRC

Before final launch, add approved certificate scans, expiry dates or report numbers if the factory team agrees to publish them.

Wholesale inquiry

Need documents for importer approval?

Share product type, size, quantity, target market and custom print needs. LANGMAI can support stock designs, OEM artwork and sample checks.

Request a Quote Demander un échantillon
Jinhua Langmai Daily-Using Co., Ltd.

LANGMAI supplies custom cake cups, cupcake liners, air fryer paper liners, paper straws and paper party accessories for B2B buyers.

Buyer Actions

Trust

Founded in 2006. 30,000+ square meters factory capacity. 50+ elite team members. Key certificate signals: BSCI, ISO, FSC, FDA, LFGB, EUDR, BRC.
